TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Carmelo Anthony tatama, lumeniay a banges, u Amilika kanatal a tademaw. unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u adidi'ay ayaway mimaliay. Carmelo Anthony i 2003 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 3, namapili' tu nu Denver Nuggets putiput. 5 bulad 29 demiad, 1984 a mihca, Carmelo Anthony, miunduay.
S.PHON: ¶arm…ôr~…æo antƒßonj tatama, r~…æum…ôniaj a ba≈ã…ôs, u amir~…æika kanatar~…æ a tad…ômaw. unu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, u adidi î~ °aj ajawaj mimar~…æiaj. ¶arm…ôr~…æo antƒßonj i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ *, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu d…ôn*…ôr nugg…ôts putiput. * bur~…æad ** d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, ¶arm…ôr~…æo antƒßonj, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Carmelo Anthony tatama, lumeniay a banges, u Amilika kanatal a tademaw. unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u adidi'ay ayaway mimaliay. Carmelo Anthony i 2003 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 3, namapili' tu nu Denver Nuggets putiput. 5 bulad 29 demiad, 1984 a mihca, Carmelo Anthony, miunduay.
S.PHON: ¶arm…ôr~…æo antƒßonj tatama, r~…æum…ôniaj a ba≈ã…ôs, u amir~…æika kanatar~…æ a tad…ômaw. unu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, u adidi î~ °aj ajawaj mimar~…æiaj. ¶arm…ôr~…æo antƒßonj i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ *, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu d…ôn*…ôr nugg…ôts putiput. * bur~…æad ** d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, ¶arm…ôr~…æo antƒßonj, miunduaj.
